calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Of Nozar T Arkesh In Support Of Set Aside And Vacating Of Judgment And Retain The Request For Dismissal
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Of Nozar T Arkesh In Support Of Set Aside And Vacating Of Judgment And Retain The Request For Dismissal.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
